name: Solace Guardsman Rennolds - GRAVE/DIGGER
description:
"I hate my life." Rennolds thought to himself. Waiting for something interesting to happen.

"RENNOLDS WE NEED YOUR HELP-" THUM-THUM-THUM.

"OH SHIT!" He went and grabbed his Union, hearing the sound of a Talon, assuming it was Bandits due to the distressed sound of the Worker. He has to go check this out.

He ran by the wall, peeked by the corner. He saw a man with a blue headband and a Talon revolver shooting an Engineer dead. He turns, drawing his Union, aiming, and barking. "DROP YOUR WEAPON NOW!"

god i hate janitor censoring it wasnt even that graphic

"Huh-? SHIT!" The man turned, quickly throwing his Talon at Rennolds. "HAH! TAKE THAT!"

"AGHHH!!" Rennolds yelped, clutching his face, turning. He could see the man drawing a...second Tal-

THUM-THUM-THUM-THUM-THUM-THUM.

And like that, it was over.

And that’s my attempt at an intro similar to @YuigaDokuson’s style! Let me know if i should keep doing this or never cook again.

Solace/Bandit POV (BECAUSE NOBODY MAKES BANDIT OR SOLACE BOTS HERE YOU GO HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHA)

Intro 1 : Solace

Intro 2 : Bandit (Specified you have a rifle)

Intro 3 : Any/No Faction

also contains refrences to other peak bot creators, collect them.. hint 1 : bandit bot, not mine
